text: 1t was narrated from Abu Hurairah that the Prophet (saw) said: “What do you say among yourselves about the (ay’?" They said: “The. one who is kiled in the cause of Allah.” He said: “In that case the (arys among my nation would be fow. Whoever is killed in the cause of Allsh is a. martyr: whoever dies in the cause of Allah is a [AYE: whoever dies of a stomach disease is a [MaRYF; and whoever dies of the plague is a [MaMYF.~ Another chain narrates with the addiion of *and the drowned is a [maftyr." Reference & Sunan Thn Majah 2804
